analysis.reasoning: Core message: A neutral informational tweet stating that Sec. Pompeo spoke about various topics (COVID-19, U.S.-Afghan peace process, ICC, WIPO election, China, Iran). It lists agenda items without value judgments or praise. Evaluation: US1 (honorable tradition) – Not promoted; no mention of values, legacy, or historical feats. US2 (admirable society) – Not promoted; no references to social groups, civil society, companies, or heroes. US3 (hostile enemies) – Not promoted; China and Iran are mentioned neutrally, without framing them as immoral adversaries. US4 (force for good) – Not promoted; although “U.S.-Afghan peace process” could imply peacemaking, the tweet is purely descriptive and does not claim support for human rights or helping oppressed peoples. US5 (great international ally) – Not promoted; no praise of allies or support statements. US6 (at the forefront) – Not promoted; no leadership or superiority claims. Conclusion: No listed narratives are clearly advanced.
